response.original_title: New Assistant receives Behavioral Modification Chip
response.overview: Mr King has brought his assistant Ashley in to meet with a scientist looking for investors. The scientist wants to demonstrate a new “communication” device that will make cell phones obsolete. Rion asks Ashley to help with the demonstration. The device has some interesting alternative uses that Mr. King is VERY interested in trying out.
